llm_verdict.message:
The remediation is complete. You can verify the change yourself:

```sh
# Verify the runtime value (should be 0)
sysctl -n net.ipv4.conf.all.forwarding

# Verify the effective configuration after the reload
sysctl --system | grep net.ipv4.conf.all.forwarding
```

Both commands should show `net.ipv4.conf.all.forwarding = 0`, confirming that the parameter is disabled at runtime and persisted across reboots.

If everything looks correct, the system will now pass the **sysctl_net_ipv4_conf_all_forwarding** OpenSCAP rule. Let me know if you need any further assistance!
